def eligible_for_professional_license(self) -> bool:
        if (self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61] and
            self.employment_status in [EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED.value, EmploymentStatus.RETIRED.value,
                                       EmploymentStatus.UNEMPLOYED.value, EmploymentStatus.STUDENT.value] and
            self.education in [Education.HIGH_SCHOOL.value, Education.COLLEGE.value, Education.BACHELOR.value,
                              Education.MASTER.value, Education.DOCTOR.value] and
            self.experience_years in [2, 5]):
            return True
        else:
            return False
